zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格运行于1767附近，整体呈窄幅震荡格局，短线动能偏弱，反弹受限于1772一带压力，多空暂时均衡，市场等待方向选择

技术指标方面，MACD仍维持正值2.10但动能减弱，信号线缺失导致确认不足，趋势强度有限，短期仍以震荡为主，缺乏单边突破信号

下方支撑关注1766低点及1755区域，上方阻力集中于1772与1775均线附近，突破需放量确认，区间震荡为主

短线建议保持区间交易思路，在1766上方轻仓试多，跌破1755则需止损观望，避免追单，控制风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1767.28, showing minimal intraday change of -0.10% and maintaining a tight consolidation between 1772.54 and 1766.12. Price action suggests indecision after a recent drift lower, with the market struggling to reclaim the 20-day SMA at 1775.73. Overall structure remains mildly bearish in the short term as price continues to hover just below key dynamic resistance, indicating weak recovery momentum.

MACD 2.10408 is positive, but without a signal line it is difficult to confirm trend strength; however, the modest reading near equilibrium suggests weakening bullish momentum. In the absence of RSI data, price behavior near the SMA becomes more important, showing neutral-to-slightly bearish pressure. Volume-like compression in price range indicates consolidation rather than directional conviction, hinting at a potential breakout setup forming.

Ethereum finds immediate support at 1766.12, the session low, with stronger downside protection near 1750 and 1725 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is located at 1772.54 followed closely by the 20-day SMA at 1775.73, which acts as a critical pivot. A sustained break above this level could open a path toward 1800, while rejection reinforces range-bound trading.

Ethereum appears best suited for range trading conditions, with scalping opportunities between support and resistance levels. Long positions may be considered near 1766 with protective stops below 1750, while profit targets sit near 1772 and 1775. A breakout above SMA resistance would favor momentum longs, whereas a drop below 1766 could shift bias toward deeper retracement risk in the short-term outlook.
